# Society & Economics

Social movements, economic events, and demographic developments from the year 2007.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: category-index — maintained by build-structure; do not edit by hand -->

| Topic | Summary |
|---|---|
| [Subprime Mortgage Crisis and Bear Stearns Hedge Fund Collapse](subprime-mortgage-crisis.md) | The July 2007 collapse of two Bear Stearns subprime hedge funds — losing nearly $1.8 billion in investor capital — marked the moment housing-market stress became visible systemic failure and catalyzed the 2008 global financial crisis. |
| [Stock Market Peaks Before 2008 Crisis](stock-market-peak-october-2007.md) | The Dow Jones Industrial Average closed at an all-time high of 14,164.53 on October 9, 2007, marking the zenith of the 2002–2007 bull market before the global financial crisis erased over half its value. |
| [Oil Prices Spike to Near $100 per Barrel](oil-price-spike-2007.md) | Crude oil reached $99.29 per barrel on November 21, 2007 — the closest prices had ever come to $100 — signaling a structural shift in global energy markets driven by surging demand and constrained supply. |
